Game: Crayon Shin-Chan 2- Dai Maou no Gyakushu 1994-05-10T00:00:00-07:00 Crayon Shin-Chan 2: Dai Maou no Gyakushu is an Action game, developed by Sun L and published by Bandai, which was released in Japan in 1994. 1 <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/d158ea5e-9d7d-4b3e-b38b-ee4ef56ce38e.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/9c1e54f4-5063-458d-a8f1-26fcb54dbb6f.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/4b58891a-b659-47be-b527-a7eb3e0c4ef9.png Action; Platform Sun L Bandai
